title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Shree Cement - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!
